chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-68 of 2022 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For order on office objection. 2.For hearing of Misc.No.245/2022 3.For hearing of main case. 26.05.2025 Mr.Munim Masood, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr.Khalid Rajpar, Advocate for Respondent. Ms.Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Mr.Muhammad Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General. Per learned counsel for the petitioner finalization of assessment is pending due to this petition. He seeks that the assessment be finalized in accordance with law after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and pending the aforesaid no further coercive action be taken their against. Learned counsel for the respondent has no objection to the aforesaid and states that the petition may be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge nasir
